enum_values.name: horizontal_center
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn horizontally, centered in the middle of the context.

enum_values.name: horizontal_near
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn horizontally, aligned near to the context edge.

enum_values.name: horizontal_far
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn horizontally, aligned far from the context edge.

enum_values.name: vertical_center
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn vertically, centered in the middle of the context.

enum_values.name: vertical_near
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn vertically, aligned near to the context edge.

enum_values.name: vertical_far
enum_values.summary: Text is drawn vertically, aligned far from the context edge.
